page: Microsoft Azure E48_v4 is a memory-optimized server instance from the Ev4 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8272CL processor operating at 2.6 GHz. The configuration includes 48 virtual CPUs (24 physical cores with 2 threads per core) and 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. The processor is equipped with 35 MB of L3 cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 32 KB of L1d cache, and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and AVX-512 VNNI.

In terms of performance, the instance demonstrates strong memory capabilities, as evidenced by its Passmark memory score and high uncached read and write memory bandwidths of 199.45 GB/sec and 94.39 GB/sec respectively. Multi-threaded decompression performance is also strong, with bzip3 multi-threaded decompression reaching 189.78 GB/sec. However, single-threaded operations show some limitations, with gzip compression single-threaded performance categorized in the lower tier. The server does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options.

This hardware profile is highly cost-efficient for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. The large memory capacity combined with 48 dedicated vCPUs makes it well-suited for relational database management systems, in-memory caching layers such as Redis, and enterprise applications requiring substantial RAM.
description: Microsoft Azure E48_v4 is a memory-optimized server instance from the Ev4 family, utilizing the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with a dedicated Intel Xeon 8272CL processor featuring 48 vCPUs (24 physical cores) running at 2.6 GHz and 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a high 8:1 memory-to-vCPU ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage. Performance benchmarks indicate strong memory bandwidth, with uncached read speeds of 199.45 GB/sec and uncached write speeds of 94.39 GB/sec, alongside strong multi-threaded decompression capabilities. Conversely, single-threaded compression tasks represent a relative performance bottleneck. This configuration is highly suitable for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, in-memory databases, and large-scale data processing applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E48_v4 is a memory-optimized server featuring 48 vCPUs, 384 GB of RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and database operations.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E48_v4 is a memory-optimized server with 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor, built for database workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring high memory bandwidth and dedicated processing cores for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of RAM providing an 8:1 memory-to-vCPU ratio
Intel Xeon 8272CL processor with AVX-512 instruction support
Strong uncached memory read and write bandwidth performance
No local storage or GPU accelerators included in the base configuration
Best suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications
